SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

Interface AIiDocumentationTableRowWriteAccess

All Superinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationElement, AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationTableRow
All Known Implementing Classes:
AIcDocumentationTableRow
public interface AIiDocumentationTableRowWriteAccess extends AIiDocumentationTableRow, AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess
Provides write access to a documentation table row.

The read-only contract is defined by AIiDocumentationTableRow. This capability interface is intended for construction, aggregation, and model-processing phases. Validators, renderers, and other read-only consumers should depend on the read-only interface instead.

    void
    addCell(AIiDocumentationTableCell aCell)
    Adds a cell at the end of the row.
